events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars line downtown Cayucos for this all-day show with live band, beer garden & Lions BBQ lunch. Rain or shine, 8am–4pm.

events.title: Cayucos Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, Memorial Day through Labor Day
events.venue: Corner of D Street & Ocean Ave, Downtown Cayucos
events.summary: Beachside open-air market with local produce, seafood, baked goods, flowers & live music. Free to browse, next to the Old Cayucos Tavern.

events.title: Schooners Beachside Live Summer Concert Series
events.window: Every Saturday & Sunday afternoon, through Labor Day weekend
events.summary: Free outdoor concerts on Schooners' oceanfront patio featuring house bands, local talent & touring artists. No cover; lineup posted on their site.

events.title: Schooners Wednesday Open Mic Night
events.summary: Weekly open-mic night at this beachfront Cayucos landmark, open to all performers. Year-round every Wednesday evening.

events.title: Old Cayucos Tavern Live Music Weekends
events.venue: Old Cayucos Tavern, 130 N Ocean Ave, Cayucos
events.summary: Local & touring bands play this iconic Western-style saloon every Friday and Saturday night. No tickets needed; walk-in welcome.
